PREFIX ns: <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?x
WHERE {
FILTER (?x != ns:m.038m_v)
FILTER (!isLiteral(?x) OR lang(?x) = '' OR langMatches(lang(?x), 'en'))
ns:m.038m_v ns:sports.pro_athlete.teams ?y .
?y ns:sports.sports_team_roster.team ?x .
FILTER(NOT EXISTS {?y ns:sports.sports_team_roster.from ?sk0} || 
EXISTS {?y ns:sports.sports_team_roster.from ?sk1 . 
FILTER(xsd:datetime(?sk1) <= "2011-12-31"^^xsd:dateTime) })
FILTER(NOT EXISTS {?y ns:sports.sports_team_roster.to ?sk2} || 
EXISTS {?y ns:sports.sports_team_roster.to ?sk3 . 
FILTER(xsd:datetime(?sk3) >= "2011-01-01"^^xsd:dateTime) })
}
logical_form: ( JOIN ( R [ sports , sports team roster , team ] ) ( TC ( JOIN ( R [ sports , pro athlete , teams ] ) [ David James ] ) [ sports , sports team roster , from ] 2011 ) )

question: what to do in palo alto ca with kids
sparql:
PREFIX ns: <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?x
WHERE {
FILTER (?x != ns:m.0f04c)
FILTER (!isLiteral(?x) OR lang(?x) = '' OR langMatches(lang(?x), 'en'))
ns:m.0f04c ns:travel.travel_destination.tourist_attractions ?x .
}
logical_form: ( JOIN ( R [ travel , travel destination , tourist attractions ] ) [ Palo Alto ] )
